verses.1: A Song of degrees. I will lift up my eyes to the hills, from whence cometh my help.
verses.2: My help cometh from the LORD, who made heaven and earth.
verses.3: He will not suffer thy foot to be moved: he that keepeth thee will not slumber.
verses.4: Behold, he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep.
verses.5: The LORD is thy keeper: the LORD is thy shade upon thy right hand.
verses.6: The sun shall not smite thee by day, nor the moon by night.
verses.7: The LORD will preserve thee from all evil: he will preserve thy soul.
verses.8: The LORD will preserve thy going out and thy coming in from this time forth, and even for ever.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
